Notice Of Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Modern Marketing Concepts, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Modern Marketing Concepts, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and consent judgment are signed and filed in open court.
